Package gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils

Class Mapping

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology.Mapping
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.utils.Mapping
@Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public class Mapping extends Mapping
Deprecated.
Moved to Mapping. Use TerminologyMapper for new code.
Deprecated forwarding stub for Mapping.

    Constant used to store the original coding in Coding.userData for mapped values.

    Deprecated.
    Constant used to store the original display name in Type.userData for types with a display name.

    Deprecated.
    Constant used to store the original system in Type.userData for types with a system.

  • Constructor Details

    • Mapping

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public Mapping(String name)

      use Mapping
      Construct a new mapping with the given name.

      name - the name of the mapping

  • Method Details

    • getMapping

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static Mapping getMapping(String name)
      Deprecated.
      Use ConceptTranslator.mapCode(String, org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding) instead.
      Get the specified mapping.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the mapping
      Returns:
      The specified mapping, or null if it was not found
      See Also:
      • Mapping.getMapping(String)

    • addCodes

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void addCodes(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeSystem cs, String[] fields)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.addCodes(CodeSystem, String[]) directly.
      Add the codes in fields to the specified CodeSystem.

      Field data is expected to appear in this order: Code, Display, Definition, V2 Concept Comment, V2 Concept Comment As Published, HL7 Concept Usage Notes.

      Parameters:
      cs - The CodeSystem to add codes to
      fields - The field data, in the order: code, display, definition, comment, comment as published, usage notes
      See Also:
      • Mapping.addCodes(CodeSystem, String[])

    • createNamingSystem

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.NamingSystem createNamingSystem(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeSystem cs)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.createNamingSystem(CodeSystem) directly.
      Create a NamingSystem for the given CodeSystem.
      Parameters:
      cs - The CodeSystem to create a NamingSystem for
      Returns:
      The created NamingSystem
      See Also:
      • Mapping.createNamingSystem(CodeSystem)

    • updateCodeLookup

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static Map<String,org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding> updateCodeLookup(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding coding)
      Deprecated.
      Use DisplayNameResolver.setDisplay(String, String, String) instead.
      Updates the display-name resolution table for a coding.
      Parameters:
      coding - A coding with code, display and system all populated
      Returns:
      The updated code-lookup map where the given coding is stored
      See Also:
      • Mapping.updateCodeLookup(Coding)

    • getDisplay

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static String getDisplay(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding coding)
      Deprecated.
      Use DisplayNameResolver.getDisplay(String, String) instead.
      Given a coding with code and system set, get the associated display name for the code if known.
      Parameters:
      coding - The coding to search for
      Returns:
      The display name for the code
      See Also:
      • Mapping.getDisplay(Coding)

    • hasDisplay

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static boolean hasDisplay(String code, String table)
      Deprecated.
      Use DisplayNameResolver.hasDisplay(String, String) instead.
      Indicates whether a display name is known for a coding with the given code and table or system name.
      Parameters:
      code - The code to search for
      table - The HL7 V2 table or FHIR system URI to look in
      Returns:
      true if a display name is known for this code and table
      See Also:
      • Mapping.hasDisplay(String, String)

    • getDisplay

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static String getDisplay(String code, String table)
      Deprecated.
      Use DisplayNameResolver.getDisplay(String, String) instead.
      Get the display name for a coding with the given code and table or system name.
      Parameters:
      code - The code to search for
      table - The HL7 V2 table or FHIR system URI to look in
      Returns:
      The display name for this code and table, or null if not found
      See Also:
      • Mapping.getDisplay(String, String)

    • setDisplay

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void setDisplay(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding coding)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.setDisplay(Coding) directly.
      Given a coding with code and system set, set the associated display name for the code if one is known.

      If no display name is known the coding is unchanged. A default display name may therefore be provided before calling this method.

      Parameters:
      coding - The coding to search for and potentially update
      See Also:
      • Mapping.setDisplay(Coding)

    • reset

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Type type)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Type) directly.
      Reset a Type produced during conversion to its original, unmapped values for display and system.

      The converter adds extra data for better interoperability (e.g., display names, code system URLs). Original supplied values are stored in user data under keys such as "original{FieldName}". This method restores those original values.

      Parameters:
      type - The type to reset to original values
      See Also:
      • Mapping.reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Type)

    • reset

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding coding)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.reset(Coding) directly.
      Reset a Coding produced during conversion to its original, unmapped values for display and system.

      During the conversion process the V2 to FHIR converter stores the original V2 values in user data on the datatype. This method restores those original values.

      Parameters:
      coding - A coding produced by DatatypeConverter to reset
      See Also:
      • Mapping.reset(Coding)

    • reset

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void reset(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.CodeableConcept cc)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.reset(CodeableConcept) directly.
      Reset a CodeableConcept produced during conversion to its original, unmapped values for display and system.

      During the conversion process the V2 to FHIR converter stores the original V2 values in user data on the datatype. This method restores those original values.

      Parameters:
      cc - A CodeableConcept produced by DatatypeConverter to reset
      See Also:
      • Mapping.reset(CodeableConcept)

    • map

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding map(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Coding coding)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.map(Coding) directly.
      Given a coding and system, set the system and display values to the expected values in FHIR.
      Parameters:
      coding - The coding to adjust
      Returns:
      The mapped coding
      See Also:
      • Mapping.map(Coding)

    • mapSystem

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Identifier mapSystem(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Identifier ident)
      Deprecated.
      Use NamingSystemResolver.normalizeSystem(String) instead.
      Map the V2 system value found in ident.system to the system URI expected in FHIR.

      If the system is changed, the original value is stored and can later be retrieved via ident.getUserData(Mapping.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM).

      Parameters:
      ident - The identifier to adjust the system for
      Returns:
      The updated Identifier
      See Also:
      • Mapping.mapSystem(Identifier)

    • mapTableNameToSystem

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static String mapTableNameToSystem(String value)
      Deprecated.
      Use NamingSystemResolver.v2TableUri(String) instead.
      Given a coding system name or URL, get the preferred CodeSystem URL for FHIR.
      Parameters:
      value - A coding system name or URL
      Returns:
      The preferred name as a URL
      See Also:
      • Mapping.mapTableNameToSystem(String)

    • v2Table

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static String v2Table(String table)
      Deprecated.
      Use NamingSystemResolver.v2TableUri(String) instead.
      Return the normalized FHIR system name for the given V2 table.
      Parameters:
      table - The V2 table name
      Returns:
      The normalized FHIR system name for that table
      See Also:
      • Mapping.v2Table(String)

    • loadConceptMapFromCsv

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void loadConceptMapFromCsv(String csvContent, String name)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.loadConceptMapFromCsv(String, String) directly.
      Load a ConceptMap from CSV content and add it to the mapping lookup tables.

      CSV format expected:

      • Line 1: Header row (ignored)
      • Line 2: Column headers
      • All other lines: Mapping data rows

      If a mapping with the same name already exists it will be overwritten. Invalid rows are logged and skipped.

      Parameters:
      csvContent - The CSV content as a string
      name - The name for this mapping (used as the map identifier)
      See Also:
      • Mapping.loadConceptMapFromCsv(String, String)

    • loadCodeSystemFromCsv

      @Deprecated(since="moved to gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.terminology; use TerminologyMapper") public static void loadCodeSystemFromCsv(String csvContent)
      Deprecated.
      Use Mapping.loadCodeSystemFromCsv(String) directly.
      Load a CodeSystem from CSV content and add it to the coding lookup tables.

      CSV format expected:

      • Line 1: Metadata (url, oid, name)
      • Line 2: Column headers (Code, Display, Definition, V2 Concept Comment, …)
      • All other lines: Code definition rows

      If a CodeSystem with the same name already exists it will be overwritten. Invalid rows are logged and skipped.

      Parameters:
      csvContent - The CSV content as a string
      See Also:
      • Mapping.loadCodeSystemFromCsv(String)
